nameMeanings.name: Stretche
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Lancashire and Cheshire): nickname from Middle English strec(c)h(e), Old English stræc, strec ‘strong, violent’.

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: As a boy's name this represents a revival of Middle English Jan, a by‐form of John , or an adoption of the common European form with this spelling. As a girl's name it is a short form of names such as Janet and Janice .

en.lifeSummary: John I Stretche was born about 1268, in Ash by Iddesleigh, Devon, England, United Kingdom. He married Jone de Orwey. They were the parents of at least 1 son.

ja.lifeSummary: John I Stretcheは約1268年にイギリスイギリスデボンアッシュ ビー イッドエスレイグで生まれた。Jone de Orweyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。

ko.lifeSummary: John I Stretche(은)는 대략 1268년 영국 잉글랜드 데폰 애시 비 이데슬리에서 태어났다. 그는 Jone de Orwey(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다.
